items.name: UMG QM Satchel
items.description:
Worn by UMG Quartermasters, this signifies you're of great value to UMG. 

Has a Ulaycola (Soda), Satchel, UMG CODEX, and foam contraptions at the front for when you want to stop people from getting closer. 

Big caution tape around the area too! Handle with care.
